name: Pineapple Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large Package of Philadelphia Cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. First layer: Mix the jello and hot water according to package directions, stirring until mostly dissolved. Stir in the pineapple pieces that are not drained. Pour into a 13x9x2 inch baking dish. Refrigerate until set.
2. Second layer: In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and Cool Whip until fluffy. Spread over the chilled jello layer.
3. Third layer: In another bowl, whisk together the flour and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Gradually stir in the pineapple juice. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Spread evenly over the first two layers. Refrigerate until set.
Randy Rigg
